a.style: font-family:'Playfair Display', Georgia, 'Times New Roman', 'Liberation Serif', serif

text.tspan: Fertility rate accounting for survival until childbearing age, 2023

While the
total fertility rate
considers all births, this measure of the effective fertility rate considers how many
children per woman are expected to survive to childbearing age, using historical data and projections of
Data source: Malani and Jacob (2024); UN, World Population Prospects (2024); Human Mortality Database (2024)
Note: Childbearing age is defined by the authors as 15–49 years old, and the average survival across the age range is used.
